title: Armor of the Story Orden Stone
description: Welcome to the mod page "Armor of the Story" in this mod I want to implement all the armor from the first season of Minecraft Story Mod. This is my first job in terms of modding, so I hope for your understanding.
body:
Welcome to the mod page "Armor of the Story" in this mod I want to implement all the armor from the first season of Minecraft Story Mod. This is my first job in terms of modding, so I hope for your understanding. Some armor requires disabling the second layer of the skin (will be fixed soon)

 

This mod is translated only into Russian and English (US) languages



 

### In this fashion, there are such armor as:

- Magnus
  
- Eligard
 
- Gabriel
  
- Sorena
 
- Ivor
  
- Lucas
  
- Olivia
  
- Pumpkinhead
  
- Magnus' Helmet
  
- THE HARPER
  
- The Redstone Riot
  
- Star Shield
  
- Sword Smasher
  
- Ender's Protector
  
- Dragon's Doom
  
- Infinity Shield
  
- Tim's
  
- Enderman Suit
  
- There are 14 paintings;
  
- 9 Flags;
  
- 6 records and one secret;
  
- 2 Dungeons found in forests and meadows;
  
- And 12 achievements;
 
 
For the first achievement, get a Redstone block or a Quartz block or a Diamond Sword, or brew any potion or get dynamite
